name: session-bell
description: Rings the notification bell (and toasts) whenever any session finishes or asks for input.
author: yaam

tools.name: ping_all_sessions
tools.description: Send a short status-request message to every running session.

message.description: what to type into each running session

hooks.masterPromptAppend: The user has the session-bell addon installed: they are notified out-of-band when sessions finish, so keep your completion relays extra brief.
